Bitcoin miner Canaan posts $88.7M net loss in Q1 amid BTC decline
summary: Canaan’s Q1 results were dragged down by a $25 million inventory write-down and a 75% quarterly drop in equipment sales as Bitcoin prices retreated from their highs.

title: Estonian regulator partially suspends Zondacrypto operator license
summary: Estonia’s FIU has partially suspended BB Trade Estonia OÜ’s license, giving the Zondacrypto operator 30 days to fix compliance issues or risk full revocation.

title: Ecolab Looks to Raise About $4 Billion to Fund CoolIT Takeover
summary: Ecolab Inc. is seeking to sell around $4 billion of investment-grade bonds to help finance its acquisition of CoolIT Systems Inc., according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Niger Boosts Stake in China-Backed Pipeline as Beijing Seeks to Secure Supply
summary: Niger secured a stake in a China-backed oil pipeline after renegotiating export terms, as Beijing steps up efforts to secure reliable crude supplies amid global market disruptions.

title: SEC Prepares to Open the Door to Tokenized Stocks: Report
summary:

SEC Prepares to Open the Door to Tokenized Stocks: Report
The U.S. SEC is putting the finishing touches on a framework that would allow digital, blockchain-based versions of publicly traded stocks to trade on crypto platforms.

title: Japan’s Ruling Party Pushes On-Chain Finance Plan to Protect Yen
summary: Stablecoins and tokenized deposits could help Japan modernize payments and reduce reliance on foreign rails, the proposal says.

title: AI Slop Floods Bug Bounty Programs as Companies Struggle with Fake Reports
summary: Bug bounty platforms and software companies are struggling to handle a surge of low-quality, AI-generated vulnerability reports.
